name: Prior Auth Stack
use_case: Healthcare organizations automating prior authorization with AI-assisted coverage determination, medical necessity evaluation, and FHIR-based electronic submission.
workflows: Electronic prior auth submission via FHIR
Payer policy intelligence for PA requirements

mcps.why: Coverage determination and medical necessity criteria lookup. Validates coding accuracy before submission.
FHIR-based electronic prior authorization submission per CMS-0057 mandate.

example_prompts: What are the Medicare coverage criteria for total knee arthroplasty?
Is prior auth required for MRI of the lumbar spine under this LCD?
Validate the ICD-10 codes I plan to use for this prior auth submission
Search for the NCD covering cochlear implants and summarize the indications
regulatory_references: CMS-0057-F: Interoperability and Prior Authorization Final Rule
HL7 FHIR Da Vinci Prior Authorization Support (PAS) Implementation Guide
